---
title: "Contact"
---
The fastest way to reach me is by email.

**Email:** [a4zhong@ucsd.edu](mailto:a4zhong@ucsd.edu)

**LinkedIn:** [guanzong-zhong](https://www.linkedin.com/in/guanzong-zhong-58a4643a8/)

**GitHub:** [rsm-a4zhong](https://github.com/rsm-a4zhong)

I'm based in San Diego and open to conversations about analytics, experimentation, internships, and full-time opportunities starting late 2026.
